task: Create a JSON IAM policy document that allows read-only access (s3:GetObject and s3:ListBucket) to an S3 bucket named 'reports-bucket' and its objects
solution_criteria: Valid IAM policy JSON with Version and a Statement array; Effect 'Allow'; actions s3:GetObject and s3:ListBucket; resource ARNs for both the bucket and its objects

task: Write a Go function that extracts the region component from an AWS ARN string, e.g. returns "us-east-1" from "arn:aws:ec2:us-east-1:123456789012:instance/i-abc"
solution_criteria: Function splits the ARN on ':' and returns the 4th field (index 3); handles the standard ARN layout

task: Create a regular expression that validates an AWS S3 bucket name: 3-63 characters, only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens, and it must start and end with a letter or number
solution_criteria: Regex enforces a length of 3-63, restricts characters to lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens, and requires the first and last character to be alphanumeric
